ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the weather station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather dataset */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "max_temperature_f" REAL /* Maximum temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "mean_temperature_f" REAL /* Mean temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "min_temperature_f" REAL /* Minimum temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "max_dew_point_f" REAL /* Maximum dew point in Fahrenheit */,
  "mean_dew_point_f" REAL /* Mean dew point in Fahrenheit */,
  "min_dew_point_f" REAL /* Minimum dew point in Fahrenheit */,
  "max_humidity" REAL /* Maximum humidity */,
  "mean_humidity" REAL /* Mean humidity */,
  "min_humidity" REAL /* Minimum humidity */,
  "max_sea_level_pressure_in" REAL /* Maximum sea level pressure in inches */,
  "mean_sea_level_pressure_in" REAL /* Mean sea level pressure in inches */,
  "min_sea_level_pressure_in" REAL /* Minimum sea level pressure in inches */,
  "max_visibility_miles" REAL /* Maximum visibility in miles */,
  "mean_visibility_miles" REAL /* Mean visibility in miles */,
  "min_visibility_miles" REAL /* Minimum visibility in miles */,
  "max_wind_speed_mph" REAL /* Maximum wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "mean_wind_speed_mph" REAL /* Mean wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "max_gust_speed_mph" REAL /* Maximum gust speed in miles per hour */,
  "precipitation_in" REAL /* Precipitation in inches */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover */,
  "events" TEXT /* Weather events (e.g., Snow, Rain) */,
  "wind_dir_degrees" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of weather data */,
  "collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the method of data collection */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frequency of data collection */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES weather_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the weather type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Interval in minutes or hours for the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather dataset */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
